; --- globals ---
@.fmt.int_println = private unnamed_addr constant [4 x i8] c"%d\0A\00", align 1

; --- declarations ---
declare i32 @printf(ptr, ...)

; --- definitions ---
; @InputKt_power
define i32 @InputKt_power(i32 %arg0, i32 %arg1) {
entry:
  %t0 = add i32 0, 0
  %t1 = icmp eq i32 %arg1, %t0
  br i1 %t1, label %bb1, label %bb2
bb1:
  %t2 = add i32 0, 1
  ret i32 %t2
bb2:
  br label %bb3
bb3:
  %t3 = add i32 0, 2
  %t4 = srem i32 %arg1, %t3
  %t5 = add i32 0, 0
  %t6 = icmp eq i32 %t4, %t5
  br i1 %t6, label %bb4, label %bb5
bb4:
  %t7 = add i32 0, 2
  %t8 = sdiv i32 %arg1, %t7
  %t9 = call i32 @InputKt_power(i32 %arg0, i32 %t8)
  %t10 = mul i32 %t9, %t9
  ret i32 %t10
bb5:
  br label %bb6
bb6:
  %t11 = add i32 0, 1
  %t12 = sub i32 %arg1, %t11
  %t13 = call i32 @InputKt_power(i32 %arg0, i32 %t12)
  %t14 = mul i32 %arg0, %t13
  ret i32 %t14
}

; @main
define i32 @main() {
entry:
  %t0 = add i32 0, 2
  %t1 = add i32 0, 10
  %t2 = call i32 @InputKt_power(i32 %t0, i32 %t1)
  call i32 (ptr, ...) @printf(ptr @.fmt.int_println, i32 %t2)
  %t4 = add i32 0, 3
  %t5 = add i32 0, 5
  %t6 = call i32 @InputKt_power(i32 %t4, i32 %t5)
  call i32 (ptr, ...) @printf(ptr @.fmt.int_println, i32 %t6)
  %t8 = add i32 0, 5
  %t9 = add i32 0, 3
  %t10 = call i32 @InputKt_power(i32 %t8, i32 %t9)
  call i32 (ptr, ...) @printf(ptr @.fmt.int_println, i32 %t10)
  ret i32 0
}
